improvement: Added a fail-closed verifier that checks coherence across the immutable run manifest, independently produced preflight verdict, and exact-commit dispatch decision before evidence upload.
privacy_boundary: No credential values, private chats, health material, or diagnosis/treatment claims are read or emitted.
claim_boundary: Source behavior is committed. A successful workflow execution, Cloudflare authorization, deployment, hostname resolution, served identity, and scientific truth remain unverified until direct evidence exists.
rollback: Remove the verifier invocation, its test line, release-verdict digest entry, and uploaded release-verdict artifact; prior preflight behavior remains otherwise intact.
falsification_route: Run the committed Node tests and the preflight workflow at commit 42bf389d63f815d7ecb2d2f15f65891f137d2cd4; any accepted packet with a mismatched source, verdict, decision, workflow, commit, or artifact set falsifies the gate claim.
